elements.name: iac.set_listener
elements.description: Sets the listener function for inter-app communication events.

parameters.name: type
parameters.doc:
The type of iac, an iac.TYPE_ enumeration. It can be one of the predefined constants below
- `iac.TYPE_INVOCATION`
